hero.lead: Atyab Mozzarella is made fresh daily from carefully selected milk, giving you the perfect stretch and rich flavour in every slice of pizza or Italian dish.

aboutTeaser.title: From Egyptian farms to your table
aboutTeaser.body: We started with a genuine passion for cheesemaking. Today we proudly craft natural mozzarella using traditional methods paired with the highest quality standards — no preservatives, no shortcuts.

why.title: Quality you can taste
why.subtitle: Every block of mozzarella goes through careful steps to guarantee the finest flavour and texture.
why.card1Body: Fresh milk only — no preservatives, no artificial colours.
why.card2Body: Smooth pull and even melt that make every dish look professional.
why.card3Body: From our facility to your door, quickly, while staying cold and fresh.

featured.title: A carefully chosen selection
featured.subtitle: Our most requested products, loved by our customers.

ctaBand.title: Ready to order Atyab Mozzarella?
ctaBand.body: Reach out on WhatsApp or call us directly, and we'll help you choose the right product for your needs.

contactHome.title: We're happy to help, any time
contactHome.subtitle: Our team is ready to answer your questions and orders through more than one channel.

footer.tagline: Premium natural mozzarella cheese, crafted with passion for your table.

productsPage.title: The Atyab Mozzarella range
productsPage.subtitle: Browse all our fresh products and order directly via WhatsApp or a phone call.

aboutPage.title: Passion for cheese, commitment to quality
aboutPage.lead: Atyab Mozzarella is an Egyptian facility dedicated to crafting natural cheese, born from a simple dream: mozzarella that rivals the best in the world.
aboutPage.storyBody: From day one we chose the harder path: fully natural ingredients, precise production processes, and strict quality control on every single batch. Today, we're proud to be trusted by hundreds of restaurants and households alike.
aboutPage.year1Body: We started in a small kitchen with a genuine passion for high-quality natural cheese.
aboutPage.year2Body: We opened our first facility and began partnering with restaurants and hotels.
aboutPage.year3Body: We serve hundreds of customers daily while holding the same high quality standards.

contactPage.title: Let's hear from you
contactPage.subtitle: Whether it's an order or a question, our team is here to help at any time.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your order or question...
contactPage.formHint: Your message will be sent directly to the Atyab Mozzarella team on WhatsApp.
